wordplay_note: Pete's murdered wife whose death drives the plot
card_description: Patricia Hawkins is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Game-Players of Titan*. Pete Garden's wife whose murder reveals the Vugs' conspiracy. Name note: Pete's murdered wife whose death drives the plot. Death as the clue that the game is rigged. First appears in *The Game-Players of Titan*.

reference.brief: Pete Garden's wife whose murder reveals the Vugs' conspiracy
reference.significance: Death as the clue that the game is rigged
